mods.name: XP Tracker
mods.author: Frappe
mods.description: Per-skill session XP, XP/hr, and actions-to-next-level. Draggable + dockable panel.

mods.name: Battle Panel
mods.author: Frappe
mods.description: Lists on-screen enemies; click to attack, right-click to pin a type.

mods.name: Hunting Panel
mods.author: Frappe
mods.description: Prettier, clickable hunting expedition tracker with Double/Half Count toggles.

mods.name: Buff Panel
mods.author: Frappe
mods.description: Fixed-size buff slots, time under each icon, pulsing red when a buff is about to run out.

mods.name: Shift To Drop
mods.author: Frappe
mods.description: Hold the modifier and left-click an inventory item to drop it instantly.

mods.name: Hotbar
mods.author: Frappe
mods.description: Adds a hotbar with keybind support.

mods.name: Loot Tracker
mods.author: Frappe
mods.description: Tracks the loot that drops on the ground from your kills.
